name: state
stdout:
Step 2 (state) complete. No commit per rule 6.

**What was done:**
- `scripts/review-gate/state.mjs` — new module (Node built-ins only) exporting `loadState`, `saveState`, `getCachedVerdict`, `recordVerdict`, `revisionCount`, `isBlocked`, `markBlocked`, `recordPass`, `InternalError`, implementing the §3.5 state shape and §4.2/§4.3 revision/BLOCKED/infra-retry semantics.
- `scripts/review-gate/tests/state.test.mjs` — 7 tests covering AC-5, AC-6, AC-9, AC-13, run-scoping, atomicity, PASS-record round trip.
- `scripts/review-gate/state.test.mjs` — same-folder TDD-guard shim (imports tests/state.test.mjs), identical workaround as steps 0-1.
- `phases/3-review-gate/index.json` — step 2 completed with summary/contract/completed_at; no other steps touched.

**Verification:**
- `node --test scripts/review-gate/tests/state.test.mjs` → exit 0, 7/7 pass.
- Regression: capsule (7) + verdict (14) still pass — 21/21 total.
- `git status --porcelain` confirms only the four files above changed — Forbidden block respected.

Design note: `recordPass` stores the caller-supplied record as-is (spec §3.5 fully shapes pass_records), while `recordVerdict` stamps its own `at` timestamp since the caller supplies only (capsuleHash, classification).
